title: See Who is Working in a Board
excerpt: Is there a way to see who is viewing or working on a board at the same time as you? Similar to working on a google doc where you can see an icon at the top of the screen that shows who has the document open, something si…

posts.author: kaylak (Kayla K)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to see who is viewing or working on a board at the same time as you? Similar to working on a google doc where you can see an icon at the top of the screen that shows who has the document open, something similar to that would be nice to have in Monday.

I didn’t realize a coworker was working on the same board and thought an automation was acting up, but it turns out they were just editing the same item as me which caused us both confusion. I figured out what was happening by looking at the activity log, but it would be helpful to see if anyone else is on a board at the same time so you can communicate with them if needed.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Kayla,

I really like this idea! At this stage it isn’t currently possible to view who is active within the board at that specific point in time - I’d really encourage you to submit this as a feature request so that our community can add their vote

In the meantime, we do have the activity log that allows you to track changes in the board, incase this helps?

Support

The Activity Log

5 min read Feature     Wondering how to keep track of your team's activity? The Activity Log is your answer. Stay in the loop at all times by tracking board changes in one place.   Locating t...

posts.author: kaylak (Kayla K)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks for the confirmation, I went ahead and submitted this as a feature request!

We have used the activity log for this, but it is not as intuitive and not everyone knows about it so something that is easier to see would be great.
